scripts.build: npm run build -w jvf-dtm-types && npm run build -w jvf-parser && npm run build -w jvf-topology && npm run build -w jvf-viewer
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w jvf-dtm-types && npm run typecheck -w jvf-parser && npm run typecheck -w jvf-topology && npm run typecheck -w jvf-viewer
scripts.test: npm run test -w jvf-parser && npm run test -w jvf-topology
